TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lasutan, title = Lasutan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lasutan} }

S.FORM: alang Lasutan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,940 buwan, 4,942 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 633 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 4,309 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lasutan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lasutan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lasutan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lasutan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lasutan hya' ga Singsiya. tay mkyahu' na Lasutan hya' ga Kenuy. tay 'llaw na Lasutan hya' ga Tasutasunan. tay 'zil na Lasutan hya' ga Takubuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Lasutan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,940 buwan, 4,942 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 633 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 4,309 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lasutan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Lasutan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Lasutan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lasutan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lasutan hya' ga Singsiya. tay mkyahu' na Lasutan hya' ga Kenuy. tay 'llaw na Lasutan hya' ga Tasutasunan. tay 'zil na Lasutan hya' ga Takubuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ las~ɕutan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiŋs~ɕija. taj mkjaħuʔ na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa kenuj. taj ʔllaw na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa tas~ɕutas~ɕunan. taj ʔzil na las~ɕutan ħjaʔ ɣa takuβuwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
